sheet_name: ขยายการวางพื้นสำเร็จรูป SP แผนที่ 1/2
view_title: ลักษณะการวางพื้นสำเร็จรูป SP (precast plank installation details, sheet 1 of 2)
schema_note: t3 independent read. Uses Gen 4's precast_plank_detail element_type (adopted from Makham's Pattern Gen 3.1 item 8) instead of forcing beam main_bar/stirrup fields. RESOLVES an uncertainty flagged on page 23 (t3): the '*' asterisk seen there and here is footnoted at the bottom of THIS sheet -- '* หรือเป็นไปตามข้อกำหนดการวางพื้นสำเร็จรูปของผู้ผลิตโดยต้องไม่น้อยกว่า 0.05 ม.' (or per the precast-plank manufacturer's own spec, provided not less than 0.05m bearing) -- not a missing note, just printed on a different sheet than where the symbol first appears. ALSO NOTE: this sheet's 'เสริมพิเศษ Ø6มม.@0.20' (site-placed topping reinforcement, 6mm@200mm) is a DIFFERENT layer from the 'Wire Mesh 4.00มม.@0.20ม.' factory mesh mentioned in page 18's general notes (S-01) -- both are real, describing different reinforcement layers (factory-embedded mesh inside the precast plank itself vs. field-placed bars in the site-poured topping concrete), not a contradiction between pages.

topping_mesh.note: เสริมพิเศษ Ø6มม.@0.20 ม. -- field-placed in topping, separate from any factory mesh inside the plank itself
